descriptionZh: 1.5亿年前 — 始祖鸟时代，最早的鸟类出现在恐龙时代
descriptionEn: 150M years ago — Age of Archaeopteryx, the earliest birds appeared alongside dinosaurs

descriptionZh: 6000万年前 — 早期海鸟出现，鸟类开始多样化
descriptionEn: 60M years ago — Early seabirds appeared, birds began to diversify

descriptionZh: 500万年前 — 现代鸟类群体形成
descriptionEn: 5M years ago — Modern bird groups formed

descriptionZh: 至今 — 当代物种，我们今天看到的鸟类
descriptionEn: Today — Current species, the birds we see today
